response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: r4c3 is 0.10 below threshold (0.20 SoC) with normal urgency; balanced policy and current 42.2% SoC margin support micro-transfer to restore trust and prevent cascade deadlock recurrence.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.3, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Cascade scarcity deadlock broken by lowering threshold to 0.30 and enabling balanced micro-transfers (0.25 kW/tick) to urgent requesters r3c2 and r4c1. Removing distrusted_peers list to signal reciprocal cooperation and restore trust. Current SoC 42.2% with 1.5-hour autonomy margin; cluster survival depends on peer aid. Accepting inbound requests from geographic circle to rebuild reputation..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
